bird.name: Thick-billed vireo
bird.summary: The thick-billed vireo (Vireo crassirostris) is a species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-babblers. It…

locations.name: 開曼群島
locations.summary: 开曼群岛（英語：Cayman Islands /ˈkeɪmən/或/keɪˈmæn/），有時也譯為凯门群島或蓋曼群島，是英国在美洲加勒比海西印度群岛的一块海外属地，由大開曼、小开曼和開曼布拉克3个岛屿组成。開曼群島是世界第四大离岸金融中心…

relations.subject: Thick-billed vireo
relations.evidence: alleni: the Cayman Islands The species has also been recorded several times in Florida. The thick-billed vireo inhabits deciduous woodlands, scrublands, and mangroves
